synthesis.driver: Escalating US-Iran clashes in Hormuz push Brent higher, but oversupply limits the spike.
synthesis.based_on: Fears Mount of US and Iran Escalation After Sixth Day of Clashes

takes.fears mount of us and iran escalation af: Clashes escalate, reinforcing war premium and pushing prices up despite supply glut.
takes.iran accuses us of hitting civilian infr: Iran's accusation signals worsening tensions, adding upward pressure on oil prices.
takes.us iran war live no us troops killed or: No US casualties contain panic, but war-risk premium still supports prices.
takes.abc construction materials costs fall wi: Falling construction costs signal weak demand, capping oil price increases.
